ddls:
CREATE TABLE "boroughs" (
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each borough */,
  "borough_name" TEXT /* Name of the borough */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the borough in square kilometers */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the borough */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income of the borough */,
  "housing_units" INTEGER /* Total number of housing units in the borough */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the borough */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the borough it belongs to */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the neighborhood */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the neighborhood */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the neighborhood in square kilometers */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the neighborhood */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income in the neighborhood */,
  "housing_units" INTEGER /* Total number of housing units in the neighborhood */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the neighborhood */,
  "boundary" TEXT /* Geometry column to store the boundary coordinates of the neighborhood (e.g., in WKT format) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_neighborhoods_borough_id FOREIGN KEY ("borough_id") REFERENCES boroughs ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the neighborhood */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the neighborhood */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income in the neighborhood */,
  "housing_units" INTEGER /* Total number of housing units in the neighborhood */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* A JSON column to store the age distribution in the neighborhood */,
  "ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* A JSON column to store the ethnicity distribution in the neighborhood */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* A JSON column to store the education level distribution in the neighborhood */,
  "employment_rate" REAL /* The employment rate in the neighborhood */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* The unemployment rate in the neighborhood */,
  "median_age" INTEGER /* The median age of the population in the neighborhood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the neighborhood the feedback pertains to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user submitting the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback provided by the user */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* The type of feedback (e.g., 'issue', 'suggestion', 'praise') */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the feedback (e.g., 'open', 'in progress', 'resolved') */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The last date the feedback was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., 'resident', 'city planner') */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
